stem: An employee earns an annual salary of $\$58\,500$. Calculate their weekly pay.
Priya earns an annual salary of $\$94\,120$. Calculate her fortnightly pay.
hint: There are $26$ fortnights in a year. Fortnightly pay $=$ annual salary $\div\ 26$.

stem: A retail assistant is paid $\$29.50$ per hour and works a standard $38$-hour week. What is their weekly pay?
hint: Weekly pay $=$ hourly rate $\times$ hours worked.

stem: Joel earns an annual salary of $\$78\,000$. Calculate his monthly pay.
Anika earns $\$28.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. She works $5$ additional hours at time-and-a-half. What is her total gross weekly pay?
hint: Calculate ordinary pay and overtime pay separately. The time-and-a-half rate is $1.5 \times$ the normal rate.

stem: Marcus earns $\$32.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. He works $4$ extra hours at double time. What is his gross weekly pay?
hint: The double-time rate is $2 \times$ the normal rate.

stem: Zoe earns $\$24.00$ per hour. In a week she works $38$ ordinary hours, $3$ hours at time-and-a-half and $2$ hours at double time. Find her total gross weekly pay.
hint: Calculate each component separately: ordinary pay, time-and-a-half pay, double-time pay, then add.

stem: Damien earns $\$36.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. He works $3$ hours overtime at time-and-a-half. Calculate his total gross weekly pay.

Chloe earns $\$30.00$ per hour. In a fortnight she works $76$ ordinary hours, $8$ hours on Saturday at time-and-a-half and $4$ hours on a public holiday at double time. Calculate her fortnightly gross income.
hint: Calculate ordinary pay, Saturday penalty pay and public holiday penalty pay separately, then add all three.

stem: An employee receives an annual salary of $\$75\,088$. They work a standard $38$-hour week for $52$ weeks per year. What is their hourly rate of pay?
hint: Total hours per year $= 38 \times 52$. Hourly rate $=$ annual salary $\div$ total hours.
explanation:
Total hours per year: $38 \times 52 = 1\,976$

$$\text{Hourly rate} = \frac{\$75\,088}{1\,976} = \$38.00 \text{ per hour}$$

stem: Lily is offered two jobs. Job A offers an annual salary of $\$54\,600$. Job B pays $\$28.00$ per hour for a standard $38$-hour week. How much more per week does Job B pay than Job A?
hint: Convert the annual salary to a weekly amount (divide by $52$), then compare with the hourly rate option.

stem: Ben earns $\$34.00$ per hour. In a fortnight he works $76$ ordinary hours, $6$ hours on Saturday at time-and-a-half and $4$ hours on Sunday at double time. Find his fortnightly gross income.
hint: Calculate ordinary pay, Saturday penalty pay and Sunday penalty pay separately, then add.
